name: Crimson Vale Expansion
author: Claude
description: Dark creatures and forbidden magic from the Crimson Vale.

monsters.name: Blood Wraith
monsters.description: A spectral horror formed from the spilled blood of fallen warriors. It drifts through the vale seeking living hosts to drain.

attacks.name: Life Drain
attacks.specialEffect: DC 14 CON or lose 1d4 max HP until long rest

attacks.name: Wail
attacks.specialEffect: DC 12 WIS or frightened for 1 round

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Can move through solid objects. Takes half damage from non-magical weapons.

abilities.name: Blood Sense
abilities.description: Can detect wounded creatures within far range.

abilities.name: Sunlight Weakness
abilities.description: Disadvantage on attacks and checks in direct sunlight.

monsters.name: Thornbeast
monsters.description: A hulking mass of twisted vines and thorns, animated by dark magic. It guards the deep groves of the vale.

abilities.name: Thorn Aura
abilities.description: Creatures that hit the thornbeast with melee attacks take 1d4 piercing damage.

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.description: Regains 3 HP at the start of its turn unless it took fire damage last round.

monsters.name: Ashen Knight
monsters.description: The reanimated remains of a fallen paladin, still clad in scorched plate armor. Its hollow eyes burn with cold purpose.

attacks.name: Cursed Greatsword
attacks.specialEffect: DC 15 CON or cursed: -1 to all rolls for 1 hour

abilities.name: Undead Fortitude
abilities.description: When reduced to 0 HP, DC 12 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead. Does not work against radiant damage.

abilities.name: Command Undead
abilities.description: Once per encounter, can summon 1d4 skeletons that act on its turn.

abilities.name: Aura of Dread
abilities.description: Creatures within close range have disadvantage on morale checks.

spells.name: Blood Pact
spells.description: Sacrifice 1d6 of your own HP. An ally within close range regains twice the HP sacrificed. While focusing, both caster and target gain +1 to attack rolls.

spells.name: Thorn Cage
spells.description: Thorny vines erupt from the ground, trapping a target in a cage. DC 15 STR to break free. While trapped, the target takes 1d4 piercing damage at the start of each round.

weapons.name: Blood Dagger
weapons.description: A crimson-bladed dagger that whispers when near the wounded.

gear.name: Crimson Elixir
gear.description: A thick, dark-red potion brewed from vale herbs. Heals 2d6+2 HP but causes vivid nightmares on next rest (no HP recovery from that rest).

gear.name: Thornwood Talisman
gear.description: A carved talisman of thornwood. Once per day, the bearer can reflect 1d6 damage back to a melee attacker.

backgrounds.name: Vale Exile
backgrounds.description: You were cast out of the Crimson Vale for a crime you may or may not have committed. You know its hidden paths and dark secrets.
